2026-05-18.original_title: AI startup revenue hits $80 billion, but Anthropic and OpenAI take almost all of it
2026-05-18.original_content: Anthropic and OpenAI now capture 89 percent of revenue among top AI startups, according to an analysis by The Information. The article AI startup revenue hits $80 billion, but Anthropic and OpenAI take almost all of it appeared first on The Decoder .
2026-05-18.chinese_title: AI创业公司年营收破800亿美元，Anthropic和OpenAI拿走近九成
2026-05-18.summary: 据The Information分析，头部AI创业公司年化收入合计已达800亿美元规模，但其中Anthropic与OpenAI两家就占据了89%的份额，行业马太效应进一步加剧，留给其他玩家的市场空间被持续压缩。
2026-05-18.extension: 可延伸讨论中小AI创业公司的生存空间被挤压的现象，关联国内AI六小龙的差异化路径选择；也可联系微软、亚马逊作为两家公司主要投资方的资本回报与算力订单流向。
